title: Beacon policy provider contract (v1)
description: Wire contract between a Beacon hook and an external policy provider named by BEACON_POLICY_PROVIDER. The hook writes a Request to the provider's stdin and reads a Response from its stdout.

phase.description: Which hook is consulting the provider.

platform.description: Agent runtime platform (e.g. claude, cursor, devin).

event.description: Beacon endpoint Event describing the imminent tool call. Uses the same field names as the runtime JSONL log and the open Threat Rules schema.

decision.description: Verdict. Any value other than "deny" is treated as allow (fail-open).

reason.description: Human-readable explanation surfaced to the runtime and telemetry.

rule_id.description: Identifier of the provider rule that produced the decision.

severity.description: Provider-reported severity (e.g. low, medium, high, critical).
